scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute STRATA_DB --local --file=./migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute STRATA_DB --local --file=./migrations/0002_install_challenges.sql && wrangler d1 execute STRATA_DB --local --file=./migrations/0003_hardening.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: node ./scripts/validate-wrangler-config.mjs && wrangler d1 execute STRATA_DB --remote --file=./migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute STRATA_DB --remote --file=./migrations/0002_install_challenges.sql && wrangler d1 execute STRATA_DB --remote --file=./migrations/0003_hardening.sql
